# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      name: my-instance-template
      properties:
        machineType: n1-standard-1
        disks:
          - deviceName: boot-disk
            autoDelete: true
            boot: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
        networkInterfaces:
          - network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/YOUR_PROJECT/networks/default

  - name: managed-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      baseInstanceName: my-instance-group
      targetSize: 2
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.instance-template.selfLink)

  - name: sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.databaseInstance
    properties:
      settings:
        tier: db-f1-micro
        ipConfiguration:
          authorizedNetworks:
            - value: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/YOUR_PROJECT/global/networks/default
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7

  - name: storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      locationType: MULTI_REGIONAL
      name: my-storage-bucket

  - name: backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      name: my-backend-service
      backends:
        - group: $(ref.managed-instance-group.instanceGroup)
      healthChecks:
        - httpHealthCheck:
            port: 80

  - name: url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      name: my-target-http-proxy
      urlMap: $(ref.url-map.selfLink)

  - name: http-load-balancer
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      portRange: '80'
      target: $(ref.target-http-proxy.selfLink)
